languages.text: "Бог-Император? Cжалься и забери... К подножью {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Золотого Трона{/g}... Мои сандалии стерты, но я иду... Я так потерян... Так потерян..." {n}Старик сжимает руки в аквиле. Он так сильно вдавливает их в грудь, что слышен хруст органической кисти под аугментом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан... Вас направил сюда Бог-Император? Он готов сжалиться и забрать меня к подножью {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Золотого Трона{/g}? Я так потерян... Так потерян..." {n}Старик сжимает руки в аквиле. Он так сильно вдавливает их в грудь, что слышен хруст органической кисти под аугментом.{/n}
traits.speaker: Amalgam_Fresh

languages.text: "God-Emperor? Take pity on me, take me... to the foot of Your {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... I am lost... so lost..." {n}The old man squeezes his hands in the sign of the Aquila. He presses them into his chest so hard that you hear the crunch of his organic hand against the augmetic.{/n}

I am lost... so lost..." {n}The old man squeezes his hands in the sign of the Aquila. He presses them into his chest so hard that you hear the crunch of his organic hand against the augmetic.{/n}

languages.text: 「キャプテン様…神皇帝様はあなたを遣わされたのですか？神皇帝様は私を憐れみ、{g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}黄金の王座{/g}のふもとまで導いてくださるのでしょうか？私は迷子です…とても迷子です…」{n}老人はアキラの印で両手を握り、胸に押し付けると、生体手と増幅手の音が聞こえます。{/n}

I am lost... so lost..." {n}The old man squeezes his hands in the sign of the Aquila. He presses them into his chest so hard that you hear the crunch of his organic hand against the augmetic.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「キャプテン様…神皇帝様はあなたを遣わされたのですか？神皇帝様は私を憐れみ、黄金の王座のふもとまで導いてくださるのでしょうか？私は迷子です…とても迷子です…」{n}老人はアキラの印で両手を握り、胸に押し付けると、生体手と増幅手の音が聞こえます。{/n}
「キャプテン様…神皇帝様はあなたを遣わされたのですか？神皇帝様は私を憐れみ、{g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}黄金の王座{/g}のふもとまで導いてくださるのでしょうか？私は迷子です…とても迷子です…」{n}老人はアキラの印で両手を握り、胸に押し付けると、生体手と増幅手の音が聞こえます。{/n}

languages.text: “神皇？可怜可怜我吧，带我……去您的{g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}黄金王座{/g}之下……我的凉鞋早已磨烂，可我依然在前行……我迷失了……迷失得太久了……”{n}老人双手做出双头鹰手势，随后重重按在胸前。这力道如此之大，你甚至能听到他的血肉之手撞上植入物所发出的吱嘎声。{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor? Take pity on me, take me... to the foot of Your {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... I am lost... so lost..." {n}The old man squeezes his hands in the sign of the Aquila. He presses them into his chest so hard that you hear the crunch of his organic hand against the augmetic.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “神皇？可怜可怜我吧，带我……去您的{g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}黄金王座{/g}之下……我的凉鞋早已磨烂，可我依然在前行……我迷失了……迷失得太久了……”{n}老人双手做出双头鹰手势，随后重重按在胸前。这力道如此之大，你甚至能听到他的血肉之手撞上植入物所发出的吱嘎声。{/n}

languages.text: « Empereur-Dieu ? Prenez-moi en pitié et conduisez-moi... au pied du {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Trône d'Or{/g}... mes sandales sont en lambeaux, mais je continue à marcher... Je suis perdu... complètement perdu... » {n}Le vieil homme fait le signe de l'Aquila, puis presse ses mains si fort sur sa poitrine que vous entendez ses os craquer contre l'augmétique.{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor? Take pity on me, take me... to the foot of Your {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... I am lost... so lost..." {n}The old man squeezes his hands in the sign of the Aquila. He presses them into his chest so hard that you hear the crunch of his organic hand against the augmetic.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Empereur-Dieu ? Prenez-moi en pitié et conduisez-moi... au pied du {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Trône d'Or{/g}... mes sandales sont en lambeaux, mais je continue à marcher... Je suis perdu... complètement perdu... » {n}Le vieil homme fait le signe de l'Aquila, puis presse ses mains si fort sur sa poitrine que vous entendez ses os craquer contre l'augmétique.{/n}

languages.text: «Dios Emperador, apiádate de mi. Llévame... al pie de tu {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Trono Dorado{/g}... Mis sandalias están destrozadas, pero sigo andando... Estoy perdido... totalmente perdido...». {n}El anciano aprieta sus manos en el signo del Aquila. Las lleva al pecho con tanta fuerza que oyes el crujido de su mano orgánica contra el aumético.{/n}

I am lost... so lost..." {n}The old man squeezes his hands in the sign of the Aquila. He presses them into his chest so hard that you hear the crunch of his organic hand against the augmetic.{/n}

Estoy perdido... totalmente perdido...». {n}El anciano aprieta sus manos en el signo del Aquila. Las lleva al pecho con tanta fuerza que oyes el crujido de su mano orgánica contra el aumético.{/n}

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator... Merhamet et, beni... {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Altın Taht'ın{/g} eteğine götür... Sandaletlerim paramparça oldu ama yürümeye devam ediyorum... Kayboldum... Hem de hepten..." {n}Yaşlı adam, ellerini Çift Başlı Kartal işareti oluşturacak şekilde sıkıyor. Onları göğsüne o kadar sert bastırıyor ki organik elinin ogmentiğe çarparken çıkardığı çatırtıyı duyuyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor? Take pity on me, take me... to the foot of Your {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... Kayboldum... Hem de hepten..." {n}Yaşlı adam, ellerini Çift Başlı Kartal işareti oluşturacak şekilde sıkıyor. Onları göğsüne o kadar sert bastırıyor ki organik elinin ogmentiğe çarparken çıkardığı çatırtıyı duyuyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: "Gottimperator? Sei mir gnädig, bring mich ... zu Deinem {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Goldenen Thron{/g} ... Meine Sandalen sind zerschunden, aber ich gehe noch ... Ich bin verloren ... so verloren ..." {n}Der alte Mann bildet mit seinen Händen das Zeichen des Adlers. Er drückt sie derart fest an seine Brust, dass du das Knirschen seiner organischen Hand auf der Augmentation hörst.{/n}
